ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the parameter */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Standard name of the parameter */,
  "standard_name_vocabulary" TEXT /* Vocabulary used for standard name */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the parameter */,
  "unit_conversion_factor" REAL /* Unit conversion factor for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was collected */,
  "spatial_resolution" TEXT /* Spatial resolution of the dataset */,
  "temporal_resolution" TEXT /* Temporal resolution of the dataset */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Data format of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_values" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data value */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the value belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the measurement location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the measurement location */,
  "uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty associated with the measurement */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "unit_conversion_factor" REAL /* Unit conversion factor to a base unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standard_names" (
  "standard_name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard name */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Standard name of the parameter */,
  "standard_name_vocabulary" TEXT /* Vocabulary used for standard name */,
  "vocabulary_url" TEXT /* Vocabulary URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access type */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "reply_to" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "share_logs" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the dataset */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was shared */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of share */,
  "share_description" TEXT /* Description of the share type */,
  "shared_url" TEXT /* URL of the shared dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_share_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_share_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spatial_data" (
  "spatial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spatial data point */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the spatial data belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the spatial data point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the spatial data point */,
  "spatial_value" REAL /* Value of the spatial data point */,
  "geometry_type" TEXT /* Geometry type of the spatial data point */,
  "spatial_reference_system" TEXT /* Spatial reference system of the spatial data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spatial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_data_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "derived_parameters" (
  "derived_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each derived parameter */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the derived parameter is based on */,
  "derived_name" TEXT /* Name of the derived parameter */,
  "derived_description" TEXT /* Description of the derived parameter */,
  "calculation_formula" TEXT /* Calculation formula for the derived parameter */,
  "derived_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the derived parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("derived_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_derived_parameters_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the dataset */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage */,
  "usage_description" TEXT /* Description of the usage type */,
  "usage_location" TEXT /* Location of the usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_usage_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
